labels_origin: manual / human-reviewed against the rubric in the spec; NEVER produced by attachiq.triage.policy.classify_triage or by any model output. Some labels deliberately diverge from the rule policy (vague prompts, archive vs delete, redaction modifiers, conflicting instructions).
intended_use: evaluation only; not used for training, tuning, model selection, threshold tuning, or early stopping.
image_source: real RVL-CDIP images extracted to data/raw/images/<class>/.
design_note: This is the hard v1 challenge set. It replaces an earlier soft set archived under reports/ablation/challenge_set_original_soft*.
